allow: Bash(printf '\\n.etf-row-clickable { cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.15s; }\\n.etf-row-clickable:hover td { background: #fdfbf7; }\\n.etf-row-clickable:hover .etf-symbol { color: var\(--aurum-gold\); }\\n')
Bash(sqlite3 -header -column Aurum_Infinity_AI/aurum.db "SELECT ticker, name, name_zh_hk, name_zh_cn FROM stocks_master WHERE ticker IN \('601398.SS', '0700.HK', 'AAPL'\) LIMIT 5;")
